calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-28-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Amended OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Oralean Genochio was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Oralean Alim Genochio.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-28-2010 Granted Per Written Order

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-28-2010 Granted Per Written Order

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME

AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-24-2009 Reset To Jan-14-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Oralean Genochio was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in the file.

The Court cannot proceed with today's proposed name change as further documentation is required from petitioner. Good cause appearing, this matter is continued to January 14, 2010 @ 9:00 a.m. in Department 218.

Amended Order to Show Cause for Change of Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.

HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
